buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/20 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary/20 hover:border-primary/50 hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all

cards.product: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-slate-100 hover:border-primary/20 shadow-sm hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.feature: bg-slate-50/50 hover:bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl transition-all hover:shadow-lg border border-transparent hover:border-slate-100

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'framer-motion' for all entrance animations. Products should float in.
The Hero section must use a clean, high-key photography style. Use the product images with a subtle drop shadow to make them pop against a white/light blue background.
Implement the 'WhatsApp' button as a floating action button (FAB) in the bottom right, pulsating gently.
For the Map, use an iframe with the coordinates: Kutawaringin Industrial Park.
Do NOT use a contact form. Only WhatsApp.
Ensure the layout is responsive. Products usually stack on mobile.
Use the exact product descriptions provided in the JSON.
The 'Advantages' section should use Phosphor Icons (e.g., ShieldCheck, Leaf, Flask, Truck).
Backgrounds: Avoid plain white everywhere. Use subtle gradients like bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-white.
universal_guidelines: Use 24px-32px border radius for cards (Modern Organic feel).
Typography must be legible and crisp.
Interactive elements must have clear hover states.
